# Repo Agent Playbooks

This directory is the repo’s single shared home for agent playbooks that are useful across Copilot, Claude, and other coding agents.

## Use these first

- `accessibility.agent.md` — UI accessibility review and remediation
- `azure-iac-generator.agent.md` — Azure infrastructure generation
- `azure-principal-architect.agent.md` — Entra/RBAC identity and access design
- `bicep-plan.agent.md` — infrastructure planning for Bicep changes
- `bicep-implement.agent.md` — Bicep implementation changes
- `devops-expert.agent.md` — deployment, CI/CD, and repo operations
- `github-actions-expert.agent.md` — workflow and automation changes
- `postgresql-dba.agent.md` — database design and query review
- `se-security-reviewer.agent.md` — security review and threat checks
- `se-technical-writer.agent.md` — documentation and release notes

## Notes

- Keep this directory as the primary shared agent reference for the repo.
- Avoid duplicating these playbooks in top-level helper folders.
- If a new agent playbook is added, document its intended use here.
